content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Enemy is weak". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/61/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The input consists of multiple test cases. Each test case contains an integer n, followed by n integers representing the health of enemies.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the minimum number of turns required to defeat all enemies.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the enemies by their health in descending order and then defeat them one by one.

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input().split()[0])
    v = list(map(int, input().split()))
    v.sort(reverse=True)
    turns = 0
    for i in range(n):
        turns += 1
    print(turns)
